value.stringValue: Clicked Confirm and Swap Kits button.

SELECT Id, Name, Opportunity__c, Lab_Provider__c, Status__c, Status_Reason__c, Kit_Id__c, Request_Id__c, Date_Sent_to_Distribution__c FROM Lab_Order__c WHERE Status__c NOT IN ('Cancelled 10x', 'Cancelled Lab', 'Results Delivered') AND Opportunity__c = '
SELECT Id, Name, Customer_Name_GT__c, Date_of_Birth__c, Gender__c FROM OpportunityLineItem WHERE OpportunityId = '
SELECT Name, StageName, Opportunity_Status__c, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = FALSE AND AccountId ='

Flow.description: Allows end users to swap two lab order kits.
Flow.label: Screenflow - Lab Order - Swap Kits

recordLookups.description: We need to get only precision Id to Update On Account
recordLookups.name: Get_Account_From
recordLookups.label: Get Account - From

recordLookups.description: We need to get only precision Id to Update On Account
recordLookups.name: Get_Account_To
recordLookups.label: Get Account - To

recordLookups.description: This will get all of the fields to "Clone" the Lab Order.
recordLookups.name: Get_Lab_Order_From
recordLookups.label: Get Lab Order - From

recordLookups.description: This will get all of the fields to "Clone" the Lab Order.
recordLookups.name: Get_Lab_Order_To
recordLookups.label: Get Lab Order - To

recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_FROM
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity Line Item Details - FROM

recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_TO
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity Line Item Details - TO

recordUpdates.name: Update_Accounts_With_New_Precision_Id_s
recordUpdates.label: Update Accounts With New Precision Id's

fields.name: Screen1Detail
fields.fieldText:
This screen flow is meant to be used when two lab orders for two different people were sent to the same address and each completed by the wrong person.


These Lab Orders will need to have their Opportunity values swapped so that the each Lab Order is associated with the correct Opportunity and Account.


Find the two Lab Order records who's Opportunity value you would like to swap using the lookups below. Once you have found them, navigate to the next page to confirm the details and finzalize the exchange.

value.stringValue: Select Account You Are Swapping From
Select Account You Are Swapping To

fields.name: ScreenBDetail
fields.fieldText:
Below you will find details regarding the two lab orders whose Opportunity value will be swapped.


Make absolutely sure that these details are correct before you confirm.

fields.name: LabOrderADetail
fields.fieldText:
Lab Order FROM Details


Account: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_FROM.Opportunity.Account.FirstName} {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_FROM.Opportunity.Account.LastName}


Opportunity: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_FROM.Opportunity.Name}


Kit ID: {!dt_LabOrders_From.firstSelectedRow.Kit_Id__c}


Date Sent to Distribution: {!dt_LabOrders_From.firstSelectedRow.Date_Sent_to_Distribution__c}


Date Sent to Lab: {!rec_NewLabOrder_From.Date_Sent_to_Lab__c}


Line Item FROM Details

Customer Name: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_FROM.Customer_Name_GT__c}

Gender: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_FROM.Gender__c}

Date of Birth: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_FROM.Date_of_Birth__c}

fields.name: LabOrderBDetail
fields.fieldText:
Lab Order TO Details


Account: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_TO.Opportunity.Account.FirstName} {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_TO.Opportunity.Account.LastName}


Opportunity: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_TO.Opportunity.Name}


Kit ID: {!dt_LabOrder_To.firstSelectedRow.Kit_Id__c}


Date Sent to Distribution: {!dt_LabOrder_To.firstSelectedRow.Date_Sent_to_Distribution__c}


Date Sent to Lab: {!rec_NewLabOrder_To.Date_Sent_to_Lab__c}


Line Item TO Details

Customer Name: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_TO.Customer_Name_GT__c}

Gender: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_TO.Gender__c}

Date of Birth: {!Get_Opportunity_Line_Item_Details_TO.Date_of_Birth__c}

textTemplates.name: txt_OpportuntyFromMessage
textTemplates.text: Opportunity Kit Id changed from {!txt_LabKitIdFrom} to {!txt_LabKitIdTo}

textTemplates.name: txt_UserSelectionInSwapScreen

variables.description: This is text due to needing in the Case Object and Lab Order Object
variables.name: recordId
